## Summary
<!-- Describe what this change accomplishes and why. -->

## Design Review Checklist
<!-- Ensure your changes meet the design system standards. -->

### ♿ Accessibility
- [ ] Contrast ratios meet WCAG 2.1 AA (4.5:1).
- [ ] Keyboard navigation is logical and focus rings are visible.
- [ ] Semantic HTML and ARIA labels are used correctly.

### 📱 Responsive
- [ ] Layout is mobile-first and works on all breakpoints.
- [ ] Above-the-fold content is optimized for laptop viewports.

### ⚙️ States & Tokens
- [ ] Loading, empty, and error states are handled.
- [ ] Design tokens (spacing, helper-text classes) are followed.

## Screenshots / Record
<!-- Attach screenshots or a screen recording to demonstrate the change. -->

## Testing
<!-- Describe how you verified these changes. -->
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] Manual keyboard/screen-reader test
